channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Teen accused of possessing extremist materials granted bail under strict conditions
item.description: A 18-year-old teenager has been released on bail following accusations of possessing bomb-making manuals and extremist material linked to Islamic State. The youth, arrested in March after authorities ...

item.title: Pritty Vishy Announces She Is Beginning a Career as a DJ
item.description: Kenyan influencer Pritty Vishy has announced that she is venturing into DJing, adding another role to her growing career as a content creator and influencer. She shared the news through a video posted...

item.title: Simulation reveals the International Space Station's incredible speed at ground level
item.description: A simulation demonstrating the International Space Station (ISS) traveling at ground level has captivated viewers, highlighting its astonishing speed. The visualization shows the ISS orbiting Earth at...

item.title: Navigating Financial Stress at Family Dinners: A Guide for Parents
item.description: The article explores the growing tension among families during dinner gatherings, where older generations face criticism from their children about financial hardships. A family shares their experience...

item.title: Summer Sales Guide: Top Deals on Fashion, Electronics, and Home Goods
item.description: This article provides an extensive roundup of the best summer sales across multiple categories, including fashion, electronics, home goods, beauty, travel, and more. Key highlights include significant...

item.title: JD Vance Warns of Prolonged Conflict with Iran Amid US-Israel Tensions
item.description: JD Vance, the U.S. vice president, has accused elements within the Israeli government of seeking to prolong the military campaign against Iran indefinitely, undermining diplomatic efforts. During an i...

item.title: Deputy President Kithure Kindiki's Cryptic Message Adds Tension to Ol Kalou By-Election
item.description: The Ol Kalou parliamentary by-election has become a key political battleground between President William Ruto's Kenya Kwanza administration and former deputy president Rigathi Gachagua's camp. Deputy ...

item.title: UWC's Feral Cat Project: Managing Population and Ensuring Welfare
item.description: The University of the Western Cape (UWC) has been managing a feral cat population since 1997 through the TUFCAT project, founded by Dr Sharyn Spicer and the late Andre Oppelt. The initiative focuses o...

item.title: PTI Announces Nationwide Movement for Imran Khan's Release
item.description: The Pakistan Tehreek-e-Insaf (PTI) parliamentary party has decided to launch a nationwide movement on August 5 to demand the release of party chief Imran Khan and address other demands. This date mark...

item.title: Bea Alonzo's Wedding at Txoko Asador: A Gourmet Celebration
item.description: The article details the lavish wedding reception of Bea Alonzo and Vincent Co, held at the prestigious Txoko Asador restaurant in Makati. The event, which took place on July 16, 2026, featured a metic...

item.title: FG Evacuates 1,490 Nigerians from South Africa Amid Xenophobic Attacks
item.description: The Federal Government has evacuated 1,490 Nigerian nationals from South Africa through humanitarian flights due to ongoing xenophobic attacks and security concerns. The Ministry of Foreign Affairs co...

item.title: Jammu University directs comprehensive audit of libraries and digital resources to check separatist and anti-national content
item.description: The University of Jammu has issued a directive for a thorough audit and inspection of all its libraries, offices, and digital repositories. This step aims to ensure that no books or publications with ...

item.description: The Autumn/Winter 2026 haute couture fashion week in Paris concluded with a blend of artistic imagination and meticulous craftsmanship, showcasing sculptural designs and opulent creations. Despite rec...

item.title: New Regulations for Pet Travel on Commercial Flights
item.description: Aviation authorities have introduced updated regulations for pet travel on commercial flights, addressing growing demand for clarity in pet transportation policies. The guidelines standardize procedur...

item.description: Environment ministers from across Canada's provinces and the federal government concluded a meeting in Calgary, emphasizing the need to balance conservation policies with economic development. The gat...

item.title: High Court Upholds Bhang Ban Despite Religious Claims
item.description: Former NACADA chairman John Mututho has praised the Kenyan High Court's decision to reject a petition seeking legal recognition of bhang use for religious purposes. The court ruled that existing narco...

item.title: Reclamation Project in Bacoor Threatens Local Mussel Harvests
item.description: The Revilla-backed reclamation project in Bacoor, Cavite, is causing significant harm to local mussel (tahong) harvests, threatening the livelihoods of over 1,000 families. Nenita Reyes, a 62-year-old...

item.title: NPF Tracks and Arrests Self-Styled PFIPC DG After Weeks of Surveillance
item.description: The Nigeria Police Force (NPF) successfully tracked and arrested Adeniyi Adeyemi, the self-styled Director-General of the Presidential Foreign Investment Promotion Council (PFIPC), after weeks of moni...

item.title: Geek Expo Australia: A Guide to Canberra's Pop Culture Weekend
item.description: The Geek Expo Australia is set to take place at Exhibition Park in Canberra this weekend, offering fans a chance to engage with comic creators, cosplay enthusiasts, and gaming communities. Iconic char...

item.title: PMA declares public health emergency over 651,000 zero-dose children in Pakistan
item.description: The Pakistan Medical Association (PMA) has issued a national red alert, declaring the immunisation gap a public health emergency due to 651,000 children in Pakistan remaining unvaccinated. Zero-dose c...
